content.title: Architecture Overview
content.description:
Hobson uses a bootstrap architecture where a minimal HTML file loads a modular kernel from IndexedDB. This page aggregates the detailed documentation for each architectural component.

---

## The Kernel

![](item://c0c0c0c0-0001-0000-0000-000000000000#description)

---

## Bootstrap Process

![](item://c0c0c0c0-0002-0000-0000-000000000000#description)

---

## Kernel Modules

The kernel is decomposed into specialized subsystems:

```query
const modules = await api.query({ type: api.IDS.KERNEL_MODULE });
modules.sort((a, b) => (a.name || '').localeCompare(b.name || ''));
return transcludeEach(modules, m =>
  `### [${m.name}](item://${m.id})\n${m.content?.description?.split('\n')[0] || 'No description'}`,
  { chrome: 'none' }
);
```

---

## Related Concepts

- [Event System](item://c0c0c0c0-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) — Reactive programming with events
- [Viewport](item://c0c0c0c0-0033-0000-0000-000000000000) — Top-level container and chrome
- [Navigation](item://c0c0c0c0-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) — URL handling and viewport state
- [Context Menu](item://c0c0c0c0-0034-0000-0000-000000000000) — Right-click interaction model
- [Core Concepts](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000002) — Items, types, code, views
- [Spatial Windowing](item://ef793c27-2d4b-4c99-b05a-2769db5bc5a9) — 2D canvas with positioned windows
- [Views & Rendering](item://a0a0a0a0-d0c0-4000-8000-000000000004) — View system and resolution
- [Error Handling](item://c0c0c0c0-0023-0000-0000-000000000000) — Three-tier error system
- [Code Execution & Sandboxing](item://c0c0c0c0-0028-0000-0000-000000000000) — ES module evaluation
- [Import/Export System](item://c0c0c0c0-0027-0000-0000-000000000000) — Data portability
- [Styling & Theming](item://33333333-8888-0000-0000-000000000000) — oklch color system

## Implementation Patterns

- [Silent Update Pattern](item://c0c0c0c0-0010-0000-0000-000000000000) — Save without re-rendering
- [Stale Closure Prevention](item://c0c0c0c0-0011-0000-0000-000000000000) — Read fresh data in handlers
- [Scroll State Preservation](item://c0c0c0c0-0012-0000-0000-000000000000) — Restore scroll across re-renders
- [Cycle-Safe Traversal](item://c0c0c0c0-0013-0000-0000-000000000000) — Handle cycles in item graphs
- [Type Chain Validation](item://c0c0c0c0-0014-0000-0000-000000000000) — Bounded type chain walking
- [Module Cache Invalidation](item://c0c0c0c0-0015-0000-0000-000000000000) — Timestamp-based cache

---

## Why This Architecture?

| Problem | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| Monolithic kernel can't be linked to | Decompose into items |
| Kernel can't modify itself | Load from storage, not source file |
| Broken code crashes everything | Safe mode bypasses user code |
| Can't nest Hobson instances | ID prefixing isolates storage |

**Result**: The system increasingly defines itself in terms of itself.
